languages.text: Инстинкт подсказывает Лорд-капитану, что из личных покоев что-то пропало. Нужно удостовериться, что все на своих местах.

traits.locale_text: Инстинкт подсказывает Лорд-капитану, что из личных покоев что-то пропало. Нужно удостовериться, что все на своих местах.

languages.text: Gut instinct suggests that something is missing from the Lord Captain's chambers. Check that everything is in its proper place.
languages.original_text: Инстинкт подсказывает Лорд-капитану, что из личных покоев что-то пропало. Нужно удостовериться, что все на своих местах.

Gut instinct suggests that something is missing from the Lord Captain's chambers. Check that everything is in its proper place.

languages.text: 直觉告诉你，你的舰长室里少了什么东西。检查一下，看看每样东西是否都还在原位。
languages.original_text: Gut instinct suggests that something is missing from the Lord Captain's chambers. Check that everything is in its proper place.

traits.locale_text: 直觉告诉你，你的舰长室里少了什么东西。检查一下，看看每样东西是否都还在原位。

languages.text: Tu instinto te dice que falta algo de los aposentos {mf|del|de la} Lord Capitán. Asegúrate de que todo está en su sitio.
languages.original_text: Gut instinct suggests that something is missing from the Lord Captain's chambers. Check that everything is in its proper place.

traits.locale_text: Tu instinto te dice que falta algo de los aposentos {mf|del|de la} Lord Capitán. Asegúrate de que todo está en su sitio.

languages.text: Quelque chose semble avoir disparu dans les quartiers {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine}. Allez vérifier que tout est bien à sa place.
languages.original_text: Gut instinct suggests that something is missing from the Lord Captain's chambers. Check that everything is in its proper place.

traits.locale_text: Quelque chose semble avoir disparu dans les quartiers {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine}. Allez vérifier que tout est bien à sa place.

languages.text: Das Bauchgefühl besagt, dass in den Gemächern des Lord Captains etwas fehlt. Überprüfe, ob alles an seinem Platz ist.
languages.original_text: Gut instinct suggests that something is missing from the Lord Captain's chambers. Check that everything is in its proper place.

traits.locale_text: Das Bauchgefühl besagt, dass in den Gemächern des Lord Captains etwas fehlt. Überprüfe, ob alles an seinem Platz ist.

languages.text: İçgüdüler, Lord Kaptan'ın odasinda bir şeylerin eksik olduğunu söylüyor. Her şeyin yerli yerinde olup olmadığını kontrol et.
languages.original_text: Gut instinct suggests that something is missing from the Lord Captain's chambers. Check that everything is in its proper place.

traits.locale_text: İçgüdüler, Lord Kaptan'ın odasinda bir şeylerin eksik olduğunu söylüyor. Her şeyin yerli yerinde olup olmadığını kontrol et.

languages.text: 直感的に、船長の部屋に何か足りない気がする。部屋の調度品が全て正しい場所に置かれているか確認してくれ。
languages.original_text: Gut instinct suggests that something is missing from the Lord Captain's chambers. Check that everything is in its proper place.
